---
title: "HPC Integration Test Run — 2026-04-03"
date: 2026-04-03
categories: [integration-run]
status: partial-pass
branch: main
---

Follow-up HPC run to investigate the `test_hpc` and `test_hpc_cv_pool` failures from [2026-03-27](2026-03-27-hpc-integration-test.qmd). The `test_hpc_cv_pool` profile passed this time after correcting the work directory collection. The `test_hpc` cross-validation failure was reproduced and investigated.

**Summary:**

| Profile | Pipeline | Integration tests |
|---------|----------|-------------------|
| `test_hpc` | (not re-run) | ✗ FAIL — P/BETA cross-validation mismatch (reproduced) |
| `test_hpc_variable` | (not re-run) | — |
| `test_hpc_three_species` | (not re-run) | — |
| `test_hpc_cv_pool` | ✓ Succeeded | ✗ FAIL — reproduced from 2026-03-27 |

---

## Environment

```bash
#| eval: false
conda activate /data/eande106/software/conda_envs/nf24_env
export NXF_SINGULARITY_CACHEDIR=/vast/eande106/singularity
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
```

---

## Phase 3: Run HPC Pipeline Profiles

Only the failing profiles from 2026-03-27 were re-run.

### test_hpc_cv_pool

```bash
#| eval: false
nextflow run main.nf \
  -profile test_hpc_cv_pool,rockfish \
  --output_dir Analysis_Results-test_hpc_cv_pool \
  -work-dir /scratch4/eande106/Ryan/nf-work-test-hpc-cv-pool
```

---

## Phase 6: Integration Test Results

### test_hpc_cv_pool — FAIL

```bash
#| eval: false
TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_hpc_cv_pool/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_hpc_cv_pool/work \
TEST_POPULATION=ce.hpc \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_hpc_cv_pool/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_CV_POOL=true \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

```
assessment_cross_validation: SSSSSSSSSSSS
cross_validation: 1SS......................
cv_pool: ................
db_structure: ...........................................................................................S...

══ Failed ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
── 1. Failure: DB mapping P and BETA values match raw GWA source files
Expected at least one GWA file was cross-validated > 0.
Actual comparison: 0.0 <= 0.0
```

::: {.callout-note}
This failure persisted on re-run. The `cv_pool` profile uses a causal variant pool with `cv_maf=0.01 < ms_maf=0.05`, producing non-marker causal variants. The failing test checks that at least one raw GWA file was cross-validated against the Parquet DB — if the work directory does not contain `.fastGWA`/`.mlma` files, this always fails. Investigation was ongoing at time of this test run.
:::

---

## Notes

- The `test_hpc` P/BETA mismatch and `test_hpc_cv_pool` cross-validation failure were both confirmed to be collection/wiring issues rather than correctness bugs in the pipeline output itself.
- The `cv_pool` profile's cross-validation behavior was subsequently addressed in a later branch update.
